story: World Cup 2026: England defender Marc Guehi a serious doubt for quarter-final clash with Norway
title: Guehi Out?
script: Guehi's injury jeopardizes England's quarter-final. This is a major blow as England faces a tough opponent in Norway and Guehi's absence could significantly impact their chances of advancing. England's team news just got a lot more complicated with this defensive setback. The pressure is on to find a suitable replacement and adjust their strategy accordingly. Guehi's injury has thrown a wrench into England's plans, so can they still make a deep run in the tournament now?
